name: Rebar Development & Lap Splice Length — Tension, Compression & Seismic Requirements
subtitle: Concrete Construction | Reinforcement Engineering — ACI 318-19 §25.4, §25.5, EN 1992-1-1:2004 §8.4, §8.7

inScope: Rebar Development & Lap Splice Length — Tension, Compression & Seismic Requirements
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

enum.label: Tension — seismic (Class SDC D/E/F or DCM/DCH)
Ties/stirrups present meeting ACI §25.5.2 or EC2 §8.7

standards.name: Rebar Development & Lap Splice Length — Tension, Compression & Seismic Requirements
standards.description: Rebar Development & Lap Splice Length — Tension, Compression & Seismic Requirements — Concrete Construction, Reinforcement Engineering

formulas.expression: lambda = 1.0; psi_t = 1.0; psi_e = 1.0; psi_s = (bar_diameter_mm <= 19) ? 0.8 : 1.0; cb = Math.min(cover_mm + bar_diameter_mm/2, bar_spacing_mm/2 + bar_diameter_mm/2); Ktr = (transverse_reinforcement === 'ties') ? 40 * 0.00129 * bar_diameter_mm / bar_diameter_mm * 10 : 0; cb_plus_Ktr_db = Math.min((cb + Ktr) / bar_diameter_mm, 2.5); ld_ACI_mm = (3 * fy_mpa * psi_t * psi_e * psi_s * lambda / (40 * lambda * Math.sqrt(fc_prime_mpa) * cb_plus_Ktr_db)) * bar_diameter_mm

fbd_mpa = 2.25 * 1.0 * 1.0 * 0.21 * Math.pow(fc_prime_mpa, 2/3); lb_req_mm = (bar_diameter_mm / 4) * (fy_mpa / (1.15 * fbd_mpa)); alpha1=1.0; alpha2=Math.max(1 - 0.15*(cover_mm - bar_diameter_mm)/bar_diameter_mm, 0.7); lbd_EC2_mm = Math.max(alpha1 * alpha2 * lb_req_mm, Math.max(0.3 * lb_req_mm, 10 * bar_diameter_mm, 100))
splice_factor = (load_type === 'seismic') ? 1.7 : (transverse_reinforcement === 'none') ? 1.3 : 1.3; ld_governing = Math.max(ld_ACI_mm, lbd_EC2_mm); ls_mm = ld_governing * splice_factor
formulas.reference: ACI 318-19 §25.5.2 — Class B splice: 1.3 × l_d; seismic per §18.8.2.3: 1.7 × l_d in potential hinge zones

formulas.expression: ldc_ACI_mm = (fy_mpa <= 420) ? Math.max(0.24 * fy_mpa / Math.sqrt(fc_prime_mpa) * bar_diameter_mm, 0.043 * fy_mpa * bar_diameter_mm) : Math.max((0.25 * fy_mpa - 24) / Math.sqrt(fc_prime_mpa) * bar_diameter_mm, 0.043 * fy_mpa * bar_diameter_mm); ldc_mm = Math.max(ldc_ACI_mm, 200)
formulas.reference: ACI 318-19 §25.4.9 — compression development length; minimum 200 mm

formulas.expression: l_governing_mm = (load_type === 'compression') ? ldc_mm : ls_mm; l_bars = Math.ceil(l_governing_mm / bar_diameter_mm)
formulas.reference: Governing length expressed in bar diameters for field verification; field check: L_splice / d_b
ACI 318-19 Commentary §R25.4 — large bars in low-strength concrete require excessive development lengths; minimum f'_c recommendation

validation.message: Concrete cover less than bar diameter: ACI §20.6.1 minimum cover requirement violated — fire resistance, corrosion protection, and bond transfer all inadequate
Clear bar spacing less than bar diameter: ACI §25.2.1 minimum spacing violated — concrete cannot flow between bars; splitting failure and poor consolidation
Seismic splices in low-strength concrete: ACI 318 §18.12.2 recommends f'_c ≥ 25 MPa in special moment frames; low concrete strength requires significantly longer lap lengths

warnings.message: Lap splice > 60 bar diameters: very long splice — consider mechanical couplers (ISO 15835-1) or welded splices to reduce congestion; check if staggering splices is feasible
Large bar (d_b > 28 mm) in seismic zone: ACI 318 §18.8.2.1 prohibits lap splices within beam-column joints and in potential plastic hinge zones — use mechanical couplers
No transverse reinforcement on tension splice: splitting failure risk — provide minimum ties per ACI §25.5.2; minimum 2 ties within splice length at third-points
Concrete strength below recommended for large bars: development length will be excessive and bond stress may cause splitting — upgrade to recommended f'_c
EC2 development length > 1.5× ACI value: significant code disparity — verify which standard governs for the project; EC2 tends to be more conservative for poor cover conditions

verdictText.warn: PASS — High Utilization: Peer Review Required
